zh.Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England: 英國奧可福爾格亞特 哈瑟利

zh.Rycote, Oxford, England: 英國英格蘭奧可福爾利可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Fowler於1420年出生在英國奧可福爾利可特時，他的父親Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House20歲，母親Cecilia de Englefield16歲。他於大約1446年與Joan d'Anvers在英國奧可福爾利可特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他在英國藍卡爾被列為chancellor of the duchy of lancaster。他去世於1477年11月3日在英國享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Fowler于1420年出生在英国奧可福爾利可特时，他的父亲Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House20岁，母亲Cecilia de Englefield16岁。他于大约1446年与Joan d'Anvers在英国奧可福爾利可特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他在英国藍卡爾被列为chancellor of the duchy of lancaster。他去世于1477年11月3日在英国享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fowler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fowler, a hunter or trapper of wild birds (a common medieval occupation), from Middle English fogheler, fugheler (Old English fugelere, a derivative of fugol ‘bird’).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Fowler was born in 1420, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, was 20 and his mother, Cecilia de Englefield, was 16. He married Joan d'Anvers about 1446, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. His occupation is listed as chancellor of the duchy of lancaster in Lancashire, England. He died on 3 November 1477, in England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Fowler est né en 1420, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Cecilia d’Englefield, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Joan d'Anvers environ 1446, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est chancellor of the duchy of lancaster à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1477, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Fowler 1420 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House 20 und seine Mutter Cecilia de Englefield 16. Er hat um 1446 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England Joan d'Anvers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als chancellor of the duchy of lancaster in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 3. November 1477 im Alter von 57 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Fowler è nato il nel 1420 nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia de Englefield, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Joan d'Anvers circa 1446, nel Rycote, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come chancellor of the duchy of lancaster nel Lancashire, England. Morì il 3 novembre 1477, nel England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.Rycote, Oxford, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコト
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Fowlerが1420年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトで生まれた時，父Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle Houseは20歳，母Cecilia de Englefieldは16歳であった。約1446年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトでJoan d'Anversと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はchancellor of the duchy of lancasterと記録されている。彼は1477年11月3日にイギリスで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Fowler(이)가 1420년 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia de Englefield(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1446년 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 Joan d'Anvers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 chancellor of the duchy of lancaster이었다. 그는 1477년 11월 3일 영국에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Rycote, Oxford, England: Rycote, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Fowler nasceu em 1420, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia de Englefield, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan d'Anvers aproximadamente 1446, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como chancellor of the duchy of lancaster em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1477, em Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Fowler родился в 1420 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecilia de Englefield, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan d'Anvers около 1446 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери.  Он работал по профессии chancellor of the duchy of lancaster в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер 3 ноября 1477 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Fowler nació en 1420, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Fowler Of Foxley And Castle House, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Cecilia de Englefield, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Joan d'Anvers aproximadamente 1446, en Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era chancellor of the duchy of lancaster en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1477, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
